title: Pleione rossiana
intro: Pleione rossiana, also known as the Himalayan Pleione, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Pleione rossiana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
